title: ZED BLACK Z008 Night Queen Incense Sticks, 20 Sticks x 6 Packs
features: Excellent Quality of Eco Friendly Materials
Natural Ingredients Infused with Aromatic Oils, Ideal for Home or Workplace
Uplifting Fragrances to Lift Your Mood, Great for Spiritual Purposes, Meditation or Relaxation
description: Zed Black is a leading manufacturer of incense sticks in India. Each incense stick is made from natural ingredients and infused with aromatic oils. The therapeutic fragrances range from floral to fruity aromas and are perfect for spiritual upliftment, relaxation or focus used for daily rituals, yoga or just unwinding after a long and hectic day. They deliver a long-lasting fragrance to calm the mind. All fragrances are specially hand picked to deliver a purified and calm atmosphere.
